property.name: action-label
property.value: Clean 100ms tap on light-amp vJoy button. Activation-mode must stay "release" (not "both").

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: shield raise L / salvage focus L. Hold 0.5s: light amp toggle (macro tap).

property.name: action-label
property.value: Action for Cycling Auxiliary Modes in both SC and JG. Visit Readme for audio instructions.

property.name: action-label
property.value: This cycles to SCM with no Aux mode on to keep the game synced

property.name: action-label
property.value: Action for Cycling Master Modes in both SC and JG. Visit Readme for audio instructions.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Action for Cycling Auxiliary Modes in both SC and JG. Visit Readme for audio instructions.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Action for Cycling Master Modes in both SC and JG. Visit Readme for audio instructions.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Action for Cycling Auxiliary Modes in both SC and JG. Visit Readme for audio instructions.
